name: kicadiff
description: Visual diff tool for KiCad PCB and schematic files

scripts.build:bun: node scripts/embed-viewer.mjs && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/kicadiff
scripts.build:bun:linux-x64: node scripts/embed-viewer.mjs && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/kicadiff-linux-x64
scripts.build:bun:linux-arm64: node scripts/embed-viewer.mjs && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/kicadiff-linux-arm64
scripts.build:bun:darwin-arm64: node scripts/embed-viewer.mjs && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/kicadiff-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:bun:darwin-x64: node scripts/embed-viewer.mjs && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/kicadiff-darwin-x64
scripts.build:bun:all: pnpm run build:bun:linux-x64 && pnpm run build:bun:linux-arm64 && pnpm run build:bun:darwin-arm64 && pnpm run build:bun:darwin-x64

author: sksat <sksat@sksat.net>
